prompts.title: Brand Mockup Collection

prompts.title: Anime Character

prompts.title: Instagram Product Post
prompts.prompt: Square Instagram shot of a specialty coffee cup on a wooden table, latte art heart, soft morning light from the right, blurred cafe background, warm and cozy mood, photorealistic style, ready for overlay text, clean composition.

prompts.title: Carousel Visual
prompts.prompt: Set of three matching visuals for a social media carousel about productivity, minimal flat lay of desk items on pastel backgrounds, consistent color palette, top-down view, no text in the image, 4K resolution, cohesive series look.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Banner
prompts.prompt: Wide banner image with abstract geometric shapes in blue and purple gradients, subtle tech texture, clean space on the left for title, corporate but modern look, 3:1 aspect ratio, brand visual, no text, no logo.

prompts.title: AI Evolution Timeline
prompts.prompt: Create a clean, modern vertical timeline infographic illustrating the major milestones of AI evolution from 2010 to 2025. Use a white background, thin grey dividers, and circular markers for each year. Include minimal icons, short text blocks, and smooth gradient accents in blue. Ensure the layout is symmetrical, evenly spaced, and visually balanced, with a bold header at the top reading 'Evolution of AI: 2010–2025.'

prompts.title: Marketing Insights Overview
prompts.prompt: Generate a summary-style infographic titled '2025 Marketing Insights Overview.' Use four large rectangular sections, each with an icon, a bold title, and 2–3 bullet points. Maintain a pastel color palette (muted blues, greens, corals). Keep typography clean and modern, using bold headers and light-body text. Add subtle dotted patterns and clean left-aligned layouts for readability.

prompts.title: B2B Content Marketing Steps
prompts.prompt: Design a structured infographic showing '5 Steps of B2B Content Marketing Analysis.' Arrange the steps in a horizontal zig-zag or ladder-style format. Each step includes: a large number label, a strong icon, and a two-line description. Maintain a corporate aesthetic: navy, cobalt, and white palette with geometric shapes. Add a footer bar with 'Source: ImagineArt Research.'

prompts.title: Consumer Survey Results
prompts.prompt: Create a visually engaging infographic showcasing survey results titled 'What Consumers Expect from AI Tools in 2025.' Include: A large header section, Three bar charts, Two pictogram-style percentage visuals, Small illustrations of users interacting with AI devices. Use bright colors, rounded shapes, and friendly minimal icons. Keep overall layout organized and data-heavy but clean.

prompts.title: Lung Health Tips
prompts.prompt: Design a medical-themed infographic titled '5 Essential Tips for Lung Health.' Use hospital-style minimal visuals: clean white background, soft blue accents, thin teal icons, and a human lung illustration at the top. Include sections like: 'Avoid Smoking,' 'Exercise Regularly,' 'Improve Indoor Air,' 'Stay Hydrated,' and 'Get Regular Checkups.' Use soft shadows and high readability.

prompts.title: Carbon Footprint Reduction
prompts.prompt: Create a sustainability infographic titled '10 Ways to Reduce Your Carbon Footprint.' Use earthy greens, warm beige, and natural leaf illustrations. Display information in numbered circles arranged in a grid. Include small eco-icons (leaf, water droplet, recycling, solar panel). Add a footer section showing a simple 'impact score' chart. Use textured, organic shapes to reinforce the eco theme.

prompts.title: 3D Metallic Text
prompts.prompt: Render the word 'IMAGINE' in 3D block letters with metallic gold texture, soft shadow, and high-resolution, centered on a clean white background.

prompts.title: Neon Futuristic Text
prompts.prompt: Display the phrase 'AI CREATIVE POWER' using a futuristic sans-serif font, neon cyan glow, subtle reflections on a dark gradient background, emphasizing clarity and letter spacing.

prompts.title: Calligraphy Quote
prompts.prompt: Create a motivational quote: 'Creativity is intelligence having fun.' Use hand-lettered calligraphy with flowing curves, ink texture, and watercolor background with soft gradients.

prompts.title: Logo with Symbol
prompts.prompt: Design the text 'Higgsfield AI' integrated with a looping S-curve symbol, glowing neon green accents, shadowed high contrast, suitable for digital and print display.

prompts.title: Data Chart Labels
prompts.prompt: Render a data chart with headings, labels, and percentages ('Revenue 2025: 42%', 'Growth: 18%', 'User Engagement: 76%'), each label styled consistently in legible modern sans-serif, with realistic depth, shadows, and clean visual hierarchy.

prompts.title: Tech Blog Homepage
prompts.prompt: Design a clean, modern homepage for a tech-focused blog website. Use a minimalist layout with a full-width hero section at the top, including the brand logo in the top-left, a navigation bar with 'Home, Categories, About, Contact,' and a central headline with a subheadline. Use sans-serif typography (Inter / Satoshi). Include three featured article cards with thumbnails, titles, category tags, and short summaries. Add a prominent CTA button labeled 'Read Latest Insights' below the hero text. Footer should contain social icons, newsletter signup field, and minimal copyright text. Maintain generous white space and soft shadows for a premium editorial feel.

prompts.title: Product Release Page
prompts.prompt: Create a modern, high-conversion webpage introducing new product releases. Place the company logo in the top-left and a thin navigation bar across the top. Use a bold headline such as 'Introducing Our Newest Innovations,' centered over a clean hero banner with one featured product in the spotlight. Below, create a 3–4 column grid of product cards with crisp images, product names, short feature bullets, and a 'View Details' CTA on each card. Use a geometric sans-serif font for headlines and a clean grotesk for descriptions. Maintain consistent spacing, soft gradients, and subtle drop shadows. Add a sticky CTA bar at the bottom with 'See All Products.' Footer should include links, FAQ, and contact information.

prompts.title: Jewelry E-commerce Page
prompts.prompt: Design an elegant e-commerce product page for a high-end jewelry brand. Use a serif font for headings (Playfair / Cormorant Garamond) and a refined sans-serif for body text. Place the brand logo centered at the top with a thin black navigation bar beneath it. Include a large hero section showcasing a single premium jewelry piece on a soft neutral background, with a vertical layout: product image on the left, product name + price + 'Add to Cart' button on the right. Add thumbnails of alternative angles below the main image. Include sections for product details, materials, authenticity, and customer reviews. Use gold or champagne accents for CTA buttons. Footer should contain store policies, customer care, and newsletter signup. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic with high spacing and delicate typography.

prompts.title: Car Service Landing Page
prompts.prompt: Create a bold, high-trust landing page for a car service and repair shop. Use strong, clean typography (Montserrat / Bold geometric sans). The header should include the logo on the left and a bold CTA button 'Book Service' on the right. Hero banner: a full-width image of a car in a workshop, with a headline like 'Reliable Car Service You Can Trust' and a subheadline beneath it. Include a phone number and quick-booking button directly under the headline. Below the hero, add three service feature blocks (Diagnostics, Engine Repair, Tire Replacement) with icons and short descriptions. Add a pricing table section with three tiers. Use dark greys, steel blues, and yellow accents to match automotive themes. Footer should include opening hours, location map, contact details, and certification badges.

prompts.title: Background Replacement
prompts.prompt: Replace the background of this subject with a realistic urban sunset skyline, maintaining proper shadows and ambient light interaction with the subject.

prompts.title: Cinematic Color Grading
prompts.prompt: Apply a moody, cinematic teal-and-orange color grade to this outdoor scene, increasing contrast, enhancing sunlight highlights, and deepening shadows.

prompts.title: Object Removal
prompts.prompt: Remove all background distractions from this photo, including wires, litter, and signs, while seamlessly blending the surrounding environment.

prompts.title: Rembrandt Style Transfer
prompts.prompt: Transform this photo into a hyper-realistic painting style reminiscent of Rembrandt, preserving facial features and textures but adding dramatic lighting and brushstroke textures.

prompts.title: Portrait Retouching
prompts.prompt: Enhance this portrait by smoothing skin, brightening eyes, whitening teeth, and adding soft cinematic lighting, while keeping natural textures and avoiding plastic-like effects.

prompts.title: Character Standoff
prompts.prompt: Create a manga of these characters and show the stand off between Messi and Ronaldo.

prompts.title: Meme Mashup
prompts.prompt: A high-impact, comic-style mega-mashup of iconic meme figures collaboratively driving an action-packed, retro-vibe crossover scene.

prompts.title: Intense Portrait with X Mark
prompts.prompt: A dynamic and intense close-up portrait in a graphic novel or comic book art style, featuring a male character with long, dark, slightly messy hair and a short beard, wearing a suit and tie. His eyes are glowing with furious, stylized yellow energy or smoke, extending outwards. His expression is one of extreme anger, determination, and pain, with gritted teeth and visible facial scars or distress. Dominating the image is a bold, bright red 'X' drawn over his face, extending from corner to corner of the frame, symbolizing danger, a target, or a 'no entry' warning. The artwork is characterized by strong, confident black ink lines, high contrast, and a gritty, textured, almost sketched quality. The color palette is stark: black, white, red, and vibrant yellow for the eyes, on a clean white or light grey background.

prompts.title: 2000s Mirror Selfie
prompts.prompt: A young woman taking a mirror selfie with very long voluminous dark waves and soft wispy bangs, confident and slightly playful expression, wearing a fitted cropped t-shirt with cute anime-style cat face graphic, early-2000s digital camera aesthetic, harsh super-flash with bright blown-out highlights, nostalgic early-2000s bedroom with pastel tones, chunky wooden dresser, CD player, posters of 2000s pop icons, hanging beaded door curtain, cluttered vanity with lip glosses, subtle grain, retro highlights, crisp details.

prompts.title: Professional Business Headshot
prompts.prompt: Keep the facial features of the person in the uploaded image exactly consistent. Dress them in a professional navy blue business suit with a white shirt. Background: Place the subject against a clean, solid dark gray studio photography backdrop. The background should have a subtle gradient, slightly lighter behind the subject and darker towards the edges (vignette effect). Photography Style: Shot on a Sony A7III with an 85mm f/1.4 lens, creating a flattering portrait compression. Lighting: Use a classic three-point lighting setup. The main key light should create soft, defining shadows on the face. A subtle rim light should separate the subject's shoulders and hair from the dark background. Render natural skin texture with visible pores, not an airbrushed look. Add natural catchlights to the eyes. The fabric of the suit should show a subtle wool texture. Final image should be an ultra-realistic, 8k professional headshot.

prompts.title: Bathroom Mirror Selfie
prompts.prompt: Young woman taking bathroom mirror selfie, innocent doe eyes but the outfit tells another story, mirror rules: facing mirror, hips slightly angled, close to mirror filling frame, early 20s, big innocent doe eyes looking up through lashes, 'who me?' energy, soft pout, lips slightly parted, platinum blonde hair in messy bun or claw clip, loose strands framing face, wearing ULTRA mini crop tee in yellow with BANANA logo/graphic, tight tennis skort or athletic booty shorts in white, thin stretchy athletic fabric, vacuum tight, riding up, blue and white horizontal striped over-the-knee socks, Goorin Bros cap black with animal patch worn backwards, over-ear white headphones around neck, iPhone visible in mirror held at chest level, casual iPhone mirror selfie NOT professional, regular apartment bathroom, white subway tile walls, basic bathroom mirror with good lighting above, simple white sink vanity, toiletries visible, towel hanging on hook, good vanity lighting above mirror - bright, even, flattering but not studio, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, natural slightly grainy iPhone look.

prompts.title: Fisheye Movie Character Selfie
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic fisheye wide-angle selfie, captured with a vintage 35mm fisheye lens creating heavy barrel distortion, without any camera or phone visible in the subject's hands. Subject & Action: A close-up, distorted group photo featuring [Person From Uploaded Image] taking selfie with [CHARACTERS]. Everyone is making wild, exaggerated faces, squinting slightly from the flash. Lighting & Texture: Harsh, direct on-camera flash lighting that creates hard shadows behind the subjects. Authentic film grain, slight motion blur on the edges, and chromatic aberration. It looks like a candid, amateur snapshot as if captured during a chaotic behind-the-scenes moment, not a studio photo.

prompts.title: Compact Camera Screen Display
prompts.prompt: Use facial feature of attached photo. A close-up shot of a young woman displayed on the screen of a compact Canon digital camera. The camera body surrounds the image with its buttons, dials, and textured surface visible, including the FUNC/SET wheel, DISP button, and the 'IMAGE STABILIZER' label along the side. The photo on the screen shows the woman indoors at night, illuminated by a bright built-in flash that creates sharp highlights on her face and hair. She has long dark hair falling across part of her face in loose strands, with a soft, slightly open-lip expression. The flash accentuates her features against a dim, cluttered kitchen background with appliances, shelves, and metallic surfaces softly blurred. The mood is candid, raw, nostalgic, and reminiscent of early 2000s digital camera snapshots. Colors are slightly muted with cool undertones, strong flash contrast, and natural grain from the display. Scale ratio: 4:5 vertical, Camera: compact digital camera simulation, Lens: equivalent to 28–35mm, Aperture: f/2.8, ISO: 400, Shutter speed: 1/60 with flash, White balance: auto flash, Lighting: harsh direct flash on subject, ambient low light in the background, Color grading: nostalgic digital-camera tones, high contrast flash, subtle display grain, authentic screen glow.

prompts.title: Portrait with Puppy in Snow
prompts.prompt: The girl's facial features, expression, and identity must remain exactly the same as the reference image. Young girl with long, wavy brown hair, puckering her lips toward the camera, wearing black hooded sweatshirt, holding a small white puppy with light blue eyes, calm expression looking forward. Environment: outdoors in a winter scene, snow covering the ground, bare trees in the background, blurred silver car behind the girl, clear light blue sky. Mood: cute, natural, winter outdoor moment. Camera style: soft depth of field, natural daylight, subtle winter tones.

prompts.title: Hyper-Realistic Celebrity Group
prompts.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic, ultra-sharp, full-color large-format image featuring a massive group of celebrities from different eras, all standing together in a single wide cinematic frame. The image must look like a perfectly photographed editorial cover with impeccable lighting, lifelike skin texture, micro-details of hair, pores, reflections, and fabric fibers. GENERAL STYLE & MOOD: Photorealistic, 8k, shallow depth of field, soft natural fill light + strong golden rim light. High dynamic range, calibrated color grading. Skin tones perfectly accurate. Crisp fabric detail with individual threads visible. Balanced composition, slightly wide-angle lens (35mm), center-weighted. All celebrities interacting naturally, smiling, posing, or conversing. THE ENVIRONMENT: A luxurious open-air rooftop terrace at sunset overlooking a modern city skyline. Warm golden light wrapping around silhouettes. Polished marble.

prompts.title: Magazine Cover Portrait
prompts.prompt: A photo of a glossy magazine cover, the cover has the large bold words 'Nano Banana Pro'. The text is in a serif font, black on white, and fills the view. No other text. In front of the text there is a dynamic portrait of a person in green and banana yellow colored high-end fashion. Put the issue number and today's date in the corner along with a barcode and a price. The magazine is on a white shelf against a wall.

prompts.title: Trompe L'oeil Social Media
prompts.prompt: Trompe l'oeil illusion of a subject stepping out of a large screen displaying a social media interface. The screen shows the username '@', 1K likes, and 12–20 comments, with floating emojis (heart-eyes, smiley) around it.

prompts.title: Dream Diary with Kirby
prompts.prompt: Dream diary. A pink Kirby lying asleep on a star, blowing rainbow-colored bubbles from its mouth. Soft macaron color palette, cloud and candy stickers, glittery crayon-like details, dreamy and sweet.

prompts.title: Knolling Exploded View
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic 8K flat-lay photo in strict knolling style. A top-down 90º shot of the object from the attached image, fully disassembled into 8–12 key parts and arranged in a clean grid or radial pattern on a minimalist wooden or matte gray table. Use even spacing, perfect alignment, no overlaps, and no extra objects. Light the scene with soft, diffused multi-source lighting, creating subtle shadows, neutral color balance, and crisp focus across the entire frame. Show highly detailed real-world materials (metal, plastic, rubber grips, circuit boards, screws). For every part, add a thin white rectangular frame and a short, sharp English label in clean sans-serif text, placed next to the component without covering it; annotations must be legible but unobtrusive.

prompts.title: Technical Exploded Diagram
prompts.prompt: Create a technical exploded view diagram of a device in 1080x1080 dimensions. The device should be deconstructed, showing all individual components floating in space, separated to reveal the internal parts. Each major component is labeled.

prompts.title: Concept Visualization Infographic
prompts.prompt: Create an educational infographic explaining Photosynthesis. Visual Elements: Illustrate the key components: The Sun, a green Plant, Water (H2O) entering roots, Carbon Dioxide (CO2) entering leaves, and Oxygen (O2) being released. Style: Clean, flat vector illustration suitable for a high school science textbook. Use arrows to show the flow of energy and matter. Labels: Label each element clearly in English.

prompts.title: Kids' Crayon Travel Journal
prompts.prompt: Please create a vibrant, child-like crayon-style vertical (9:16) illustration titled 'City Name Travel Journal.' The artwork should look as if it were drawn by a curious child using colorful crayons, featuring a soft, warm light-toned background (such as pale yellow), combined with bright reds, blues, greens, and other cheerful colors to create a cozy, playful travel atmosphere. In the center of the illustration, draw a 'winding, zigzagging travel route' with arrows and dotted lines connecting multiple locations. Add many cute doodles and child-like decorative elements around the route: adorable travel characters, Q-style hand-drawn iconic landmarks, funny signboards, sticker-style short phrases, cute icons of local foods, childlike exclamations. Overall art style: Crayon / children's hand-drawn travel diary style, bright, warm, colorful palette, cozy but full and lively composition, emphasize the joy of exploring. All text should be in a cute handwritten font.

prompts.title: Financial Sankey Diagram
prompts.prompt: A professional financial Sankey diagram visualizing the Income Statement of a major corporation, in the style of 'App Economy Insights' and US corporate financial reports. Visual Style: High-fidelity vector infographic, clean minimalist aesthetic, flat design. The background is a clean, very light grey or off-white. Color Strategy: Analyze the brand logo, extract its primary brand color, use this primary color as the dominant theme for the main revenue flows and profit blocks. Create a harmonious color palette based on this primary color: use saturated shades for the vertical nodes (bars) and semi-transparent, lighter opacity gradients for the flowing paths. Composition & Structure: Flow from Left (Revenue Sources) to Right (Net Profit). Texture: The connecting paths (flows) must appear 'silky smooth' with elegant Bezier curves, looking like liquid ribbons. Iconography: On the left side (Revenue sources), include specific, minimalist flat vector icons representing the business segments. Branding: Place the official logo clearly at the top center. Details: High resolution, 4k, sharp typography (sans-serif), professional data visualization layout.

prompts.title: Watercolor Map with Labels
prompts.prompt: Generate a map of Germany in watercolor style, on which all federal states are labeled in ballpoint pen.

prompts.title: Facial Age Analysis Infographic
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic, high-resolution portrait infographic based on your photo. Keep the same person, identity, hairstyle, clothing, and natural skin tone from your photo, with a neutral studio background. Overlay a subtle, semi-transparent facial analysis grid over the entire face, similar to a 3D face-scanning mesh: thin, soft white lines following the facial contours, slightly glowing but not hiding the skin details. Add one clean vertical red laser line running down one side of the face, like a futuristic scan. Create a clean medical–aesthetic infographic that evaluates 5 aging factors using global data percentages: 1. Fine lines and wrinkles, 2. Skin texture and elasticity, 3. Facial volume and sagging, 4. Eye area aging signs, 5. Skin tone and pigmentation. For each factor, place a small label with a thin line pointing to the relevant facial area, and next to it write a short title and a realistic percentage score from 0–100%. At the bottom of the image, in the center, write a large bold text showing the final estimated real age. Overall style: futuristic AI-guided skincare analysis, minimalistic, premium editorial lighting.

prompts.title: F1 VIP Fan Hyper-Realistic Edit
prompts.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic 8K image that keeps my real face, features, skin color, eyes, and hair exactly as in the reference image. I am the woman in the photo; preserve my confident, charming, and elegant expression, with a slight smile and relaxed posture. Place me at an outdoor automotive event, in a grandstand or VIP box, with a wide view of the track and the crowd in the background. The weather is sunny, with an intense blue sky and natural sunlight. The outfit is sporty yet sophisticated: A Red Ferrari cap with the yellow prancing horse logo and number '16' in white on the brim; A strapless structured denim top, tight with visible stitching; Miu Miu sunglasses with brown gradient lenses; A double necklace with large golden links and delicate diamonds; Geometric gold earrings; A silver bracelet; A discreet red bag. Hair is natural and loose. Makeup is impeccable and glamorous. Nails are long with nail art in pink and red. The pose: Right hand holding the brim of the cap, left hand holding a glass of white wine. Lighting is natural and intense. Overall atmosphere is modern, luxurious, and relaxed.

prompts.title: Fairy Grunge Idol in Closet
prompts.prompt: High-angle bird's-eye view shot of a female East Asian idol subject lying on the floor of a cluttered closet, strictly following the upside-down pose. She is wearing a rich blue lace-overlay mini dress with a milkmaid bodice, sweetheart neckline, cap sleeves, and a lettuce hem. She wears heavy, knee-high red leather boots with a vertical front seam. Visible tattoos include a barbed wire band on the thigh and small stick-and-poke heart and key motifs on the chest. The floor is covered in piles of mixed textiles, tulle, and clothing. The background walls are painted yellow, featuring white wire shelving, semi-transparent plastic storage drawers, and a packed clothing rack. Lighting is overhead tungsten, creating a warm sepia, vintage 90s disposable camera filter look. The mood is exhausted, messy, and romantically grunge. Fairy grunge aesthetic, sepia tone, high-angle shot.

prompts.title: Editorial Denim Portrait
prompts.prompt: Editorial fashion photo, 8k photorealistic, 50mm shallow depth of field, medium portrait, editorial framing, no text, no watermark. The model's face must remain 100% identical to the provided reference picture in all facial features, proportions, makeup style, and expression. Model pose: seated, relaxed pose with one leg bent, one hand supporting the head, calm minimalist mood. Wardrobe: cream shearling jacket (shaggy, fluffy, tactile texture), denim shirt layered, light blue jeans, black leather Chelsea boots (smooth polished leather), beige socks. Textures emphasis: fluffy shearling fibers, rugged denim fabric, smooth leather boots, visible seams and stitches. Environment: clean light gray studio backdrop, soft natural studio lighting with gentle side key light, subtle fill, soft shadows. Color grade: cinematic, neutral warm-cool tone balance.

prompts.title: LINE-Style Emoji Grid
prompts.prompt: Create a set of colorful, hand-drawn LINE-style half-body chibi emoji portraits based on the characters shown in the reference image, making sure their head accessories are depicted accurately. Arrange the portraits in a 4x6 grid, featuring common chat phrases or relevant humorous memes. Use handwritten-style fonts for the text. The output must be original—do not directly copy the reference image. The final image should be 4K resolution with a 16:9 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Quote Card with Portrait
prompts.prompt: A wide quote card featuring a famous person, with a brown background and a light-gold serif font for the quote: 'Stay Hungry, Stay Foolish' and smaller text: '—Steve Jobs.' There is a large, subtle quotation mark before the text. The portrait of the person is on the left, the text on the right. The text occupies two-thirds of the image and the portrait one-third, with a slight gradient transition effect on the portrait.

prompts.title: Cinematic Multi-Panel Sequence

prompts.title: Hand-Drawn Isometric Landmark

prompts.title: Swiss Alpine Winter Portrait
prompts.prompt: Hyper-realistic, ultra-detailed DSLR cinematic portrait of a young man (same facial identity as the reference) standing outdoors in a Swiss alpine village during a winter evening. Soft snow is falling, with visible frosty breath in the cold air. His hands are in his pockets in a relaxed, natural stance. He wears a thick wool winter coat, a textured knit sweater, and a loosely wrapped scarf, with a subtle accessory: a silver ring. Background: snow-covered rooftops, blurred alpine mountains, glowing chalet windows, and warm village street lamps, with soft golden bokeh reflecting on the fresh snow. Lighting: cinematic winter lighting that blends cool blue shadows with warm golden highlights. Rosy winter skin tones, sharp facial detail, shallow depth of field, and a touch of atmospheric haze. Camera: 8K, full-frame DSLR, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 100, 1/200s. Style: editorial travel portrait, hyper-realism, high dynamic range, crisp focus, and natural skin texture.
